tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent ~$106 May 15 est. (peaked $110.87 D72, Fortune confirmed; +$5 from D67 $101.26 on MOU counter-proposal rejection). Iran MOU stalled: Lebanon-first demand; Trump 'unacceptable'/'playing games'; no scheduled talks. Blockade 70+ tankers; IEA: 14M bpd Gulf cut depleting inventories at record pace. Mine-clearing ~6 months on any deal - physical Hormuz reopening delayed. Stress (50%) + Tail (40%) = 90% continued disruption. Stop-loss: confirmed MOU signature + mine clearance + P&I restoration (Brent sub-$90). Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent ~$106 May 15 est. (peaked $110.87 D72 Fortune confirmed); ASEAN Energy ~140.0 est. (+1.1%); ASEAN Banks ~178.0 est. (-0.5%); iTraxx Asia IG ~188bp (+2bp est.); ASEAN HY ~568bp (+2bp est.). Iran MOU stalled: counter-proposal (Lebanon-first) called 'unacceptable'; blockade 70+ tankers; tail 40%. ASEAN Energy rebuilding from D67 $101 base; Banks risk-off on MOU rejection. Tail (40%): MOU collapse drives Brent $125+, iTraxx 230-260bp. Conviction medium on both legs.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Hold on MOU Stalemate
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~58.20 est. (+0.5% May 15; PHP weaker on MOU stalemate - gaining from D67 57.60 entry). Iran MOU stalled: Lebanon-first demand; Trump 'unacceptable'; blockade 70+ tankers; tail 40%. Mark-to-market positive. If MOU collapses: PHP weakens further on Brent spike + risk-off. USD Call/PHP Put 61.00 overlay retains full tail hedge value. Stop-loss: confirmed MOU signature + mine clearance + P&I restoration (below 57.00). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Hold on MOU Stalemate
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~17,050 est. (+0.5% May 15; IDR weaker on MOU stalemate - gaining from D67 16,750 entry). Brent ~$106 May 15 - ICP overshoot ~$36/bbl, fiscal pressure elevated from D67 $31 overshoot. Iran MOU stalled; blockade 70+ tankers; tail 40%. Stop-loss at 16,600 reversed - now at 17,500 target. If MOU collapses: IDR weakens further on Brent spike. Stop-loss: USD/IDR 16,600 (confirmed Hormuz reopening + P&I). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Hold at 210bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~188bp (+2bp May 15 est.); ASEAN HY ~568bp (+2bp est.). Iran MOU stalled: Lebanon-first demand; Trump 'unacceptable'; blockade 70+ tankers; tail 40%. Spreads widened from 182bp D67 trough on MOU rejection; Trump-Xi (May 14) limited further widening. IEA: 14M bpd Gulf cut at record pace - credit risk premium justified. Tail (40%): MOU collapse drives iTraxx 230-260bp; stress (50%) stabilises 180-220bp. Remove at confirmed MOU + mine clearance + spreads below 165bp. Conviction medium.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold on MOU Stalemate
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM $16.99 May 12 (+0.24%, Canada LNG Group confirmed; carried D74); TTF €47.61 May 14 (+1.47%, TradingEconomics confirmed). TTF rose faster than JKM this week (European supply concerns + MOU stalemate). Ras Laffan restart not before late Aug 2026; mine-clearing ~6 months regardless of MOU. Iran MOU stalled: Lebanon-first demand blocks Hormuz framework. Structural JKM premium vs TTF intact. Stress target $18-22 JKM; tail $26-30. Stop at confirmed mine clearance + P&I restoration. Conviction medium.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG ~188bp (+2bp May 15 est.) - widening from 182bp D67 trough on MOU counter-proposal rejection; blockade 70+ tankers. Execute any residual private placements immediately. Window is narrowing: tail 40% (raised from 35%); MOU stalemate means no near-term compression. Trump-Xi (May 14) provided brief relief but sequencing gap unresolved. Tail (40%): MOU collapse targets 230-260bp.

Brent ~$106 May 15 est. (peaked $110.87 D72 Fortune confirmed); THB ~33.60 est. (+0.8%); Thailand 10Y ~2.28% est. (+3bp); tail 40%. Iran MOU stalled; blockade 70+ tankers. PTTEP EBITDA solid at $106 Brent - execute USD H2 prefunding now while credit windows open; Trump-Xi (May 14) brief window before sequencing gap clarity. Gulf JV sanctions-compliance: OFAC Economic Fury (May 11) targets IRGC oil ops entities.

iTraxx Asia IG ~188bp (+2bp May 15 est.); USD/SGD ~1.2780 est. (+0.3%); Brent ~$106 May 15. Iran MOU stalled; blockade 70+ tankers; tail 40% (raised). Spreads widening from D67 182bp trough on MOU rejection. Maintain full USD hedging; revolving-credit extension: Trump-Xi (May 14) Hormuz discussion creates brief window before sequencing gap clarity. Tail (40%): MOU collapse targets 230bp+.

ASEAN HY ~568bp (+2bp May 15 est.); Brent ~$106 May 15. Iran MOU stalled: counter-proposal rejected; tail 40% (raised from 35%). Spreads widening from D67 558bp trough - reversal underway. Hyflux desalination power cost trajectory elevated on Brent ~$106. Advance private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring terms before window closes. Tail (40%): MOU collapse pushes ASEAN HY to 620-650bp.
